cke Setting Repository
Quick Reference

cke

Role: Units

Detailed role: Enable to select a current unit for each magnitude

The cke repository has the following characteristics:

  • Primary Tab Page: /General/Parameters and Measures
  • Repository File: cke
  • Version: 1
  • Full Compatibility: 1
  • Upward Compatibility: 1

cke setting repository attributes:

  • ABSOLUTEVISCOSITY
    Role: Absolute Viscosity
    • Type: integer
    • Default value: 1
    • Values:
      1 Millipascal Second
      2 Pascal Second
      3 Newton Second per square meter
      4 Poise
      5 Centipoise
  • ABSOLUTEVISCOSITY_ExtraLarge
    Role: Unit index for magnitude ABSOLUTEVISCOSITY in ExtraLarge scale
    Detailed role: Unit index for magnitude ABSOLUTEVISCOSITY in ExtraLarge scale

    • Default value: 1
